sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try moving RIGHT to see if player can move toward right chamber
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print("Action result:", result)

# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\n=== Key nodes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['id'] in [2, 6, 7, 8]:  # purple bar, passage green, player, right green
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        r_max = max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c_max = max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"  id={n['id']:2d} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']:3d} bounds=[{r_min},{c_min}]-[{r_max},{c_max}] children={n['children']}")

# Check green frame dots
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        for child_id in n['children']:
            child = [x for x in seg['nodes'] if x['id'] == child_id][0]
            r_min = min(p[0] for p in child['boundary'])
            c_min = min(p[1] for p in child['boundary'])
            print(f"  Green frame child: id={child_id} color={child['color']} at [{r_min},{c_min}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
